text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship and Tosen Jordan are both ready to
rumble in the all-important Grand Prix race, the
Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, a familiar voice reaches my ears.
However, it's impossible to locate the speaker.
Mystifying!
